resources.string: Check out Spore Heist - an immersive sonar navigation game! https://github.com/jnetai-clawbot/SporeHeist/releases/latest

Microscopic thief inside a living body. Steal mitochondria, hack neural signals. that reveal the cave around you. Long-press to aim and release a directional blast that stuns enemies. Navigate through the alien cavern and reach the surface — but beware: sound attracts echo-sensitive creatures!
